message:
🐛 Filter llm-d stacks to only show online clusters (#789)

The stack selector dropdown was showing stacks from offline/unreachable
clusters. This happened because:

1. The cluster filter used `c.reachable !== false` which included
   clusters with `reachable: undefined` (unknown state)
2. Cached stacks from previously-online clusters persisted in the
   discovery results even after those clusters went offline

Fix:
- Tighten filter to `c.reachable === true` — only pass confirmed-online
  clusters to useStackDiscovery
- Add a second filter on returned stacks to exclude any from clusters
  that went offline between discovery runs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
